commands.command: the close reason is incorrect. the bot references commit c4f14a39a520 as evidence that reasoning_content conversion is already implemented. however, that commit (fix(codex): guard path-only bootstrap files) contains zero changes to openai-transport-stream.ts or any reasoning-related code. the only files changed are under extensions/codex/src/app-server/run-attempt.ts. i verified this by checking the commit diff directly: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/commit/c4f14a39a520 the function getcompletionsreasoningdeltas referenced in the review does not exist in this commit. this issue is also reported by multiple users: - #83408 — "reasoning_content must be passed back" 400 error with mimo - #83135 — "reasoning_content not preserved for non-deepseek openai-compatible providers" - #83475 — "session resumption causes 400 param incorrect with mimo-v2.5" all remain open or closed as "not planned". the fix is not on main. please re-review.
commands.freeform_prompt: the close reason is incorrect. The bot references commit c4f14a39a520 as evidence that reasoning_content conversion is already implemented. However, that commit (fix(codex): guard path-only bootstrap files) contains zero changes to openai-transport-stream.ts or any reasoning-related code. The only files changed are under extensions/codex/src/app-server/run-attempt.ts. I verified this by checking the commit diff directly: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/commit/c4f14a39a520 The function getCompletionsReasoningDeltas referenced in the review does not exist in this commit. This issue is also reported by multiple users: - #83408 — "reasoning_content must be passed back" 400 error with MiMo - #83135 — "reasoning_content not preserved for non-DeepSeek OpenAI-compatible providers" - #83475 — "Session resumption causes 400 Param Incorrect with mimo-v2.5" All remain open or closed as "not planned". The fix is not on main. Please re-review.

target.title: fix: convert reasoning_content to thinking blocks for All OpenAI-compatible providers
target.body:
## Problem
Models like Xiaomi MiMo (and other OpenAI-compatible providers) return `reasoning_content` in their response stream. The gateway was silently dropping this field, causing loss of reasoning/thinking data.

## Fix
Parse `reasoning_content` from the streaming delta and emit it as a proper thinking block with `thinkingSignature: "reasoning_content"`, matching the format used by Anthropic and other native providers.

## Changes
* **[src/gateway/openai-http.ts](src/gateway/openai-http.ts)**: Added `reasoning_content` $\rightarrow$ thinking block conversion in the streaming delta parser.

## Testing
Verified locally with `mimo-v2.5` , `mimo-v2.5-pro` model, reasoning content now appears correctly in session logs without errors.

---

> **Note**: This fix enables proper handling of reasoning/thinking data from OpenAI-compatible models that expose reasoning through `reasoning_content`, improving transparency and debugging capabilities.
target.author: babaksh
